description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, compute an NDVI virtual band named 'NDVI' from the Landsat multispectral image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif using band_2 (NIR) and band_3 (Red). Configure the band's 'Valid-Pixel Expression' property to 'band_2 > 0.15' to exclude water/dark pixels. Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/landsat_masked_ndvi.dim.
